header_description: Manage your integrations, API keys, recommendation algorithm, and local data.
gemini_description: Used to translate game descriptions into Portuguese.
get_api_key_button: Get it on Google AI Studio
rawg_description: Used as a source for metadata, trending games and upcoming releases.
search_metadata_description: Downloads covers and synopses in the background.
fetch_covers_tooltip: Fetches covers only for games that are missing an image
fill_missing_tooltip: Fills genres, description, tags and other empty fields by querying RAWG live
recommendation_focus_description: Adjust the weight between your personal taste (tags/genres) and what is popular among the community.
nostalgia_factor_description: Sets how much older games are penalized in recommendations.
series_settings_description: Customize how the algorithm handles sequels and franchises.
filter_adult_description: Hide games with adult content from recommendations.
save_credentials_description: Stores your keys locally in encrypted form.
manage_backup_description: Export or restore your full library (JSON). Automatic backups are created during major updates.
backup_location_info: Automatic backups are saved in app_data/backups/
clear_cache_description: Remove expired data or the entire cache to free up space.
image_storage_description: Save covers on your computer to view offline. Consumes disk space.
quick_settings_description: Quick access to system tools and diagnostics
quick_settings_generate_analysis_report_: Exports detailed statistics from the recommendation algorithm
quick_settings_updates_description: Searches for new releases on GitHub Releases
quick_settings_logs_description: System logs and exported recommendation reports
